WLUC-TV REPORTS, THAT FLOODING HAS DAMAGED MARQUETTE COUNTY ROAD 550 NEAR WETMORE LANDING IN MARQUETTE TOWNSHIP. THE MARQUETTE COUNTY ROAD COMMISSION HAS CLOSED THE ROAD TO ONE LANE WITH A TEMPORARY TRAFFIC SIGNAL IN PLACE. THE HEAVIEST RAIN WENT THROUGH THIS LOCATION AT AROUND 7:00 P.M. EDT. DELAYED REPORT.
WLUC-TV, REPORTS THAT HARLOW LAKE ROAD IS CLOSED IN MARQUETTE TOWNSHIP. THE HEAVIEST RAIN MOVED THROUGH THE HARLOW LAKE AREA AT AROUND 7:00 P.M. EDT. DELAYED REPORT.

BROADCAST MEDIA, WLUC-TV6 REPORTS THAT MARQUETTE COUNTY ROAD 510 IN IMPASSABLE AT THE NOQUEMANON 510 TRAILHEAD. THIS LOCATION IS AROUND 3 MILES NORTH OF WHERE THE BLACKTOP ENDS ON MARQUETTE COUNTY ROAD 510 ALONG THE ISHPEMING AND NEGAUNEE TOWNSHIP BOUNDARY. THE MARQUETTE COUNTY ROAD COMMISSION HAS CLOSED CR 510 FROM THE END OF THE BLACKTOP NORTH TO THE RED ROAD UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE. THE HEAVIEST RAIN WENT THROUGH THAT AREA AT 6:30 P.M. EDT JUST NORTH OF THE DEAD RIVER BASIN. DELAYED REPORT.
